title: TREKOLOGY YIZI GO Camping Chair for Adult – Compact, Foldable, Lightweight 0.9 kg, 136 kg Capacity, Durable Aluminum, Quick Setup, Ideal for Backpacking, Beach, and Outdoor Adventures (Black)
features: Ultra-Lightweight & Compact Design for Easy Travel – Weighing less than 1 kg, the YIZI GO camping chair folds down to a compact size (35 x 12 x 10 cm) that fits effortlessly into backpacks or carry-on luggage. Ideal for backpacking, camping, beach trips, and tailgating, it brings comfort wherever your adventure takes you.

Superior Comfort with Ergonomic Support – Designed with a deep-seat fabric and breathable mesh panels, this camp chair offers enhanced lower back support for ultimate relaxation. Stay cool and comfortable even in hot climates, and relax like royalty in any setting—from campfires to sporting events.

Durable Construction Built to Last – Crafted with aircraft-grade aluminum alloy and durable 600D polyester seat fabric, the YIZI GO outdoor chair combines a robust frame with double-reinforced stitching to support your outdoor adventures, accommodating up to 136 kg with ease.

Effortless Setup & Stability on Any Terrain – This portable chair sets up in seconds with a tent-style aluminum pole system. Simply unfold and connect the poles, attach the seat fabric, and you're ready to relax. The anti-slip feet ensure stability on various terrains, whether at the beach, campsite, or a concert.

Convenient Features for On-the-Go Comfort – The collapsible chair includes a side pocket to hold your essentials like phones, snacks, or drinks, keeping them within reach. The easy-to-clean fabric ensures hassle-free maintenance after your adventures. Compatible with a Sand Cover (sold separately) to increase foot area and prevent sinking in sand or soft ground.

Great Value with Proven Quality – Trusted by thousands of outdoor enthusiasts, the YIZI GO fishing chair delivers on comfort, durability, and portability. Experience the quality of a high-end camping chair without the bulky size or hefty price tag.
